locations.name: 阿根廷
locations.summary: 阿根廷共和国（西班牙語：República Argentina），通称阿根廷（西班牙語：Argentina，發音：[aɾxenˈtina] ），是位于南美洲南部的主权国家。由23个省和布宜諾斯艾利斯自治市组成的联邦共和国，占有南錐體的大部…

locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

locations.name: 巴拉圭
locations.summary: 巴拉圭共和國（西班牙語：República del Paraguay、瓜拉尼語：Paraguái Tavakuairetã），通稱巴拉圭（西班牙語：Paraguay；瓜拉尼語：Paraguái），是位於南美洲的主權國家，也是位於南美洲的內…

locations.name: 巴西
locations.summary: 巴西联邦共和国（葡萄牙語：República Federativa do Brasil），通稱巴西（Brasil），是南美洲國家，位於南美東部，東臨大西洋，人口2.15億，居世界第7。其國土大部分介于赤道和南回归线之间，面積851萬平方公…

locations.name: 科尔多瓦省 (阿根廷)
locations.summary: 科尔多瓦省（西班牙語：Córdoba）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷中部，首府為科尔多瓦（Córdoba）。 參考文獻

locations.name: American Ornithological Society
locations.summary: The American Ornithological Society (AOS) is an ornithological organization based in the United States.

relations.subject: Dinelli's doradito
relations.evidence: | status = NT | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Pseudocolopteryx | species = dinelliana | authority = Lillo, 1905 | synonyms = | range_map = Pseudocolopteryx dinelliana map.svg }} Dinelli's doradito (Pseudocolopteryx dinelliana) is a Near Threatened species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Paraguay, and possibly Brazil.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Dinelli's doradito
relations.evidence: Dinelli's doradito is found from north-central Argentina's Córdoba north into western Paraguay and slightly into southern Bolivia. The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has unconfirmed sight records in southern Brazil and therefore lists the species as hypothetical in that country. The species inhabits beds of reeds, grassy marshes, and shrublands near water
